compiled_state.title: Register check-artifact-versions.sh in plugin.json SessionStart hooks
compiled_state.author: Test
compiled_state.description:
## Testing Mode
GREEN

## Description
Add check-artifact-versions.sh to the SessionStart hooks array in plugins/dso/.claude-plugin/plugin.json. This is a structural configuration change (JSON array entry addition) with no conditional logic.

### Implementation:
Add a second entry to the SessionStart hooks array in plugin.json:
```json
{
  "type": "command",
  "command": "${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT}/hooks/check-artifact-versions.sh"
}
```

### TDD Exemption Justification
test-exempt: criterion 1 (no conditional logic — adding a JSON array entry), criterion 3 (infrastructure wiring — plugin hook registration with no business logic). Any test would be a change-detector asserting the JSON key exists.

### Files to modify
- plugins/dso/.claude-plugin/plugin.json

## File Impact
| File | Action |
|------|--------|
| plugins/dso/.claude-plugin/plugin.json | modify |

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] `bash tests/run-all.sh` passes (exit 0)
  Verify: cd $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel) && bash tests/run-all.sh
- [ ] plugin.json SessionStart hooks array contains check-artifact-versions.sh entry
  Verify: grep -q 'check-artifact-versions.sh' $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/plugins/dso/.claude-plugin/plugin.json
- [ ] plugin.json is valid JSON after modification
  Verify: python3 -c "import json; json.load(open('$(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/plugins/dso/.claude-plugin/plugin.json'))"

## Escalation Policy
Proceed unless a significant assumption is required. Document all assumptions.

comments.body: CHECKPOINT:batch-complete — Done ✓ — hook registered in plugin.json.
comments.author: Test
